turns.name: WILLIAM H. REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 86-1430, Peralta versus Heights Medical Center will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON R. WHITE
turns.text: This case is here from the Court of Appeals of Texas, and for the reasons stated in an opinion on file with the Clerk, we affirm the judgment of that court. The opinion is unanimous. Justice Kennedy took no part in the case.
